content.en:
Holy City, Heavenly Palace of Fire.

One of the galaxy-level cultivators of the Heavenly Pavilion, the Peerless True Monarch, came to the gate of the Flame Heavenly Palace.

"Stop!"

The two galaxy-level peak powerhouses guarding the gate of the Agni Fire Heavenly Palace saw the Peerless True Monarch and immediately stopped him: "This is the Flame Heavenly Palace, and idle people can't wait to enter!"

Obviously, the two of them looked down on the Peerless True Monarch who was only a galaxy-level cultivator, and if it was a famous power, even if they didn't allow him to enter, they would very politely explain the reason.

At this time, the Peerless True Monarch took out a letter and said, "Two seniors, I am the Peerless True Monarch of the Heavenly Pavilion of Tianlan Giant City, and on the order of our Pavilion Master Wanfa Allah, I will send a message to Lord Flame Tianzun, and also ask the two adults to pass on the letter. "

"Allah of Ten Thousand Laws!" one of the Star-level Guardians looked moved, "Is it His Highness Ten Thousand Laws, who was once the strongest Highness of the Terran Race?"

"Exactly!"

Wushuang Zhenjun nodded in response.

The divine senses of the two guards transmitted a sound, and then one of them spoke: "Okay, this letter, we will help you deliver it! Give us the letter, and you can leave!"

"Thank you two seniors!"

Wushuang Zhenjun handed the letter to the two of them, and turned to leave.

The two guards of the Flame Heavenly Palace immediately sent the letter in, and did not fool the Peerless True Monarch.

If it was an ordinary galaxy-level letter sent by them, they would definitely not be sent to the Flame Heavenly Palace, but Ye Tian's identity was different, his growth rate was too fast, and his combat power was extremely powerful, even the two of them who had been guarding here all year round had heard of Ye Tian's name.

Moreover, the human race is now much stronger than in the past, and Ye Tian's contribution is not small.

Therefore, their Flame Heavenly Palace naturally wanted to give Ye Tian face.

The letter was sent, but the specific matter required the decision of the Flame Heavenly Venerable, and they did not have this right.

Soon, the Flame Heavenly Venerable received Ye Tian's letter, and he was alone in the depths of the Flame Heavenly Palace to check the contents of the letter.

......

"Allah wants me to transform a companion supreme treasure broken sword into a sword!"

Flame Heavenly Venerable frowned.

Although it is easier to transform weapons than to forge them, it is the companion treasure that is transformed, which is also very difficult.

Although he can forge a top-level arcana, he will only do it once in a long time, because it is too time-consuming and consumes a lot, and he needs to rest for a long time.

In addition, he also needed to cultivate and deal with other things, and rarely took on the forging task of transforming the top treasure.

If it was an old friend, he would definitely agree, but he had never seen Ye Tian, he had only heard of Ye Tian's name, and the two were not familiar with it at all.

Just as he was about to refuse, he saw what was behind.

"Allah has a way to improve the cultivation talent of that girl in Ming Yue, is it really fake?"

Flame Tianzun was a little unconvinced, after all, it was difficult for him to find a treasure that could improve the cultivation talent of the Bright Moon Girl, after all, the Bright Moon Girl had already failed once, and she couldn't fail a second time.

If he wasn't absolutely sure, he wouldn't try again.

The letter did not say what the treasure was, only that the two met and talked face to face.

After hesitating for a few seconds, the Flame Heavenly Venerable made a decision-

"Let's talk about it, if the treasure of Allah cannot satisfy me, I will definitely not agree!"

Thinking like this, the Flame Heavenly Venerable sent someone to the Tianlan Giant City Heavenly Pavilion to invite Ye Tian to the Flame Heavenly Palace.

Tianlan Giant City, Tiange.

A cosmic god visited the Heavenly Pavilion and asked to see Ye Tian.

"Dragon Fire Universe God Greets Allah of Ten Thousand Laws!"

The Dragon Fire Universe God of the Agni Heavenly Palace said respectfully.

As a cosmic god, his identity is far beyond ordinary people, but he does not dare to be disrespectful to Ye Tian, he knows Ye Tian's status and strength very well.

In terms of strength, he is definitely not Ye Tian's opponent, and in terms of identity, Ye Tian is favored by many supremes, and has made great contributions to the human race, even if he leaves the supreme hall of the human race, his status will not be reduced too much.

"Dragon Fire Universe God, what is the matter with you coming to the Heavenly Pavilion?"

Ye Tian asked.

He already knew the purpose of the Dragon Fire Universe God, but he couldn't say it, he had to say it himself.

"Ten Thousand Laws Allah, Lord Fire Heavenly Venerable invited you to go to the Fire Heavenly Palace to discuss a matter, and Lord Fire Heavenly Venerable said that Ten Thousand Laws Allah understands what I am talking about!"

The Dragon Fire Universe God said truthfully.

"In that case, lead the way!"

Ye Tian nodded.

"Allah, please!"

The Dragon Fire Universe God hurriedly said.

Ye Tian followed the Dragon Fire Universe God to the Holy City Flame Heavenly Palace, and it didn't take long for him to meet the Flame Heavenly Venerable.

In the past, Ye Tian had only seen the sculptures and portraits of the Agni Tianzun, and it was also the first time he had seen the Agni Tianzun himself.

"Ye Tian has seen the Flame Heavenly Venerable!"

Ye Tian greeted the Flame Heavenly Venerable as a junior.

"You're welcome to Allah, please take a seat!"

Flame Heavenly Venerable said.

Ye Tian sat down, and the two immediately entered the formal topic.

"Allah of Ten Thousand Laws, you wrote to me before saying that you have a way to improve the cultivation talent of the Ming Moon girl, is this true or false? What I need to tell you is that the Ming Moon girl once used the treasure to improve the cultivation talent, but unfortunately the promotion failed, resulting in the difficulty of continuing to improve the cultivation talent many times more. At present, the human race has some treasures that can improve the cultivation talent to the universe level, but those treasures are useless to Mingyue's girl. "Flame Heavenly Venerable said.

"I know this, but that treasure of mine is enough to raise a person's cultivation talent to the level of Chaos cultivation talent, that is, it can create a master, and the success rate of the increase is nearly one hundred percent. Ye Tiandao.

"Well, there is such a treasure?"

Flame Heavenly Venerable was shocked.

The status of the master in the human race is very high, although it is not Tianzun and Supreme, but Tianzun and Supreme are so rare, it takes a long time to be able to give birth to one, and the master is the main combat force of the human race.

Whether a race is strong or not, the number of supreme is a convenience, and the number of dominants is also an aspect.

But if you want to become a master, you must be a Chaos level cultivation talent or above, but how rare the Chaos level cultivation talent is, often a star field can't be born a few.

However, Ye Tian possessed a treasure that could raise a person's cultivation talent to the Chaos level, which was too shocking.

As far as he knew, none of the major forces of the Terran clan had such treasures.

Of course, this is public information, and if someone has such a treasure in his own possession, he will not be able to find out.

"What kind of treasure is it?"

Flame Heavenly Venerable said with some excitement.

"Heavenly Dao Mu Xin, I don't know if the Flame Heavenly Venerable has heard of it?" Ye Tian asked.

"Heavenly Dao Wood Heart?" Flame Heavenly Venerable frowned, "What kind of treasure is this?"

Ye Tian casually took out a little bit of the broken Heavenly Dao Wood Heart and handed it to the Agni Heavenly Venerable: "This is the broken piece of the Heavenly Dao Wood Heart, the Agni Heavenly Venerable can check it." With the ability of the Flame Heavenly Venerable, it should be enough to recognize the effect of the Heavenly Dao Wood Heart. "

Flame Heavenly Venerable took this Heavenly Dao Wood Heart Fragment and began to examine it seriously.

After a few minutes, the Flame Heavenly Venerable was overjoyed and said, "This Heavenly Dao Wood Heart really has the effect of improving cultivation talent, and the effect far exceeds that of other treasures, but the amount is too small to make a person's cultivation talent transform!"

"This is just a fragment, far less than one person, but if the Flame Heavenly Venerable wants one person, we can trade it!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Yes!"

Flame Heavenly Venerable agreed.
